systems.name: GameLoop
systems.description: Main entry point, manages timing (rl.get_frame_time()), clears screen, and coordinates system updates and draw calls.

systems.name: InputSystem
systems.description: Reads keyboard inputs for pitch, roll, yaw, and throttle, passing them to the Player system.

systems.name: PlayerPlane
systems.description: Manages 3D transform (position, rotation), velocity, and drawing of the aircraft geometry.

systems.name: RingManager
systems.description: Spawns new rings in the distance relative to the player's trajectory and despawns missed/passed rings.

systems.name: CollisionSystem
systems.description: Checks for intersections between the player's bounding volume and the active rings, as well as the ground (y=0 plane).

systems.name: GameState
systems.description: Tracks score, remaining time, win/loss conditions, and current game mode (playing, game_over, win).

systems.name: HUDSystem
systems.description: Draws 2D overlay text showing score, timer, throttle/speed, altitude, and end-game messages.

systems.name: MathUtils
systems.description: Helper functions for 3D vector operations and rotations (pitch/yaw/roll application to forward/up vectors) to handle flight physics without gimbal lock if possible.
